specSection:
initProject :: () → ()
initProject() =
  | exists("backlog/") → skip   -- already initialised
  | otherwise          → backlog init <projectName> --defaults --agent-instructions none
ground_truth_rationale: backlog/ directory already exists, so initProject takes the 'exists(backlog/)' branch and skips initialization. This is idempotent behavior — clear SKIP case.
